title: Sweet Potato and Pilaf Peruvian-Style Casserole
description: A sweet and savory casserole that combines the flavors of Peruvian cuisine with the comfort of a hearty casserole. Sweet potatoes and pilaf are the stars of this show, topped with a gooey and decadent sauce.
instructions: Cook the pilaf according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes and cook until tender.
In a separate saucepan, combine the goat cheese, cilantro, and lime juice.
Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the cooked pilaf, sweet potatoes, and sauce in layers.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
